publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-05-14 00:03:27 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Media Services. Photo Section

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Cornell Publications Photography (Visual Services)

did.abstract: Photographs, contact sheets, negatives, and slides depicting students and faculty, buildings, and campus events.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: University Photography was formed in 1989 upon the combination of Photographic Services, Cornell Publications Photography (Visual Services), and the Media Services Photo Section.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Photographs, contact sheets, negatives, and slides depicting students and faculty, buildings, and campus events.

odd.head: NOTES
odd.p: Only part of this collection representing faculty photographs is currently processed and represented in the finding aid.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: University Photography Records, #4-14-2883. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes prints, slides, and negatives. Some files also contain printed matter about the subject.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cornell University News Release 1971, One undated photograph. Negatives included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Undated negatives and a photocopy included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: One undated photograph and negatives sheet. Negatives included.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Other people in photos as well.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: One photograph undated, short biography included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cornell Newsletters and Photos (riding bike and teaching, black suit chalk board equations) from 1968, Bethe vs. Commoner Debate 1976, Cornell Chronicle Supplement 2005

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Two sheets undated negatives and one undated photo. Magazine celebrating Bethe's life included.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives and a business card included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No photos attached to the photo request of 2004

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives only, description of photos included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Undated photograph, negatives, photocopy, and an article included.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Set of negatives, and photographs undated

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Item from 1991 is a job order

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Undated photograph, negatives and a photocopy included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: File did not provide first name- Found name based on google searsh - please check

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Undated photographs and negatives. Press release included.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: One set of photos undated. Negatives included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photos of two different people, a man and a woman

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives and notes on a video conference included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: One undated photograph and photocopy. Negatives included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives with Lee C. Lee from 1997 included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Press release and description of photos included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives and an undated CD included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No photos attached to 2004 photo request

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives only, Ted Lowi in pictures as well

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No photos attached to 2004 photo request. Negatives and photocopies included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Descriptions of some photographs included, negatives included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Undated photographs and negatives. Articles included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives included. Item from 2002 is only a job order

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: One photograph undated. Negatives, press release, and photocopies included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Undated photographs and negatives included. Includes correspondence between Husa and CU photography as well

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Undated negatives included. Press release included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives and a press release included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Set of negatives and one photograph undated

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Item from 2003 is loan form only. Negatives included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: One photograph undated. Negatives and photocopies included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Description on back of one photograph

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: One photograph undated. Press release included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Undated photographs and negatives. Press release and some photo descriptions included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives and letter from the National Academy of Engineering included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives and description of one photograph included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy, negatives, and an undated negative included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives included. Item from 1996 is a negative of an unnamed woman in what looks like the Johnson Museum

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Items from 2001 are a photocopy and an email

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives and an undated photo of Marcia Pimentel included.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Descriptions on the back of two photographs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Press releases, undated photographs, and undated zip disk included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: One set of photographs undated. Negatives and a photocopy included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives and an undated photograph enclosed

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives and an undated CD included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives and some photograph descriptions included. One photograph undated

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Undated photographs and negatives included. One description of a slide of negatives

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes book by Jeremy Byman (2001). Undated photographs and negatives included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: One photograph undated. Negatives and a newspaper article included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Description of one sheet of negatives included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives and descriptions of some photos included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Some photographs undated. One photograph description included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Undated negatives, photograph, and photocopy included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives only, one set of negatives undated

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy of 2002 issue of Cornell Discoveries included. Negatives included as well

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives included, one set of photographs undated

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photos of other staff included. One set of negatives and photographs undated

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives, undated photograph and photocopy included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1999 article from Chronicle of Higher Education included. Negatives included

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives and two undated photographs included
